command: $resp = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://balaidiklat.test" -UseBasicParsing -SessionVariable s; $token = ([regex]::Match($resp.Content, 'csrf-token" content="([^"]+)"')).Groups[1].Value; $headers = @{'X-CSRF-TOKEN'=$token; 'X-Requested-With'='XMLHttpRequest'; 'Accept'='application/json'}; $body = @{tanggal_masuk='2026-07-01'; tanggal_keluar='2026-07-03'} | ConvertTo-Json; $r2 = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://balaidiklat.test/cek-ketersediaan" -Method POST -Headers $headers -Body $body -ContentType 'application/json' -WebSession $s -UseBasicParsing; $r2.Content

command: $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://balaidiklat.test/admin/login" -UseBasicParsing -SessionVariable s -TimeoutSec 15; $token = ([regex]::Match($r.Content, 'csrf-token" content="([^"]+)"')).Groups[1].Value; $body = @{email='admin@balaidiklat.test'; password='password'; _token=$token}; $r2 = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://balaidiklat.test/admin/login" -Method POST -Body $body -WebSession $s -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 30 -MaximumRedirection 0 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Write-Output "Login status: $($r2.StatusCode)"; $r3 = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://balaidiklat.test/admin/dashboard" -WebSession $s -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 30; Write-Output "Dashboard status: $($r3.StatusCode), Length: $($r3.Content.Length)"

command: $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://balaidiklat.test/admin/login" -UseBasicParsing -SessionVariable s -TimeoutSec 15; $token = ([regex]::Match($r.Content, 'name="_token" value="([^"]+)"')).Groups[1].Value; Write-Output "Form token: $($token.Substring(0,15))..."; $body = @{email='admin'; password='semarang1'; _token=$token}; $r2 = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://balaidiklat.test/admin/login" -Method POST -Body $body -WebSession $s -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 30 -MaximumRedirection 5; Write-Output "Login status: $($r2.StatusCode)"; $r3 = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://balaidiklat.test/admin/dashboard" -WebSession $s -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 60; Write-Output "Dashboard status: $($r3.StatusCode), Length: $($r3.Content.Length)"

command: $r3 = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://balaidiklat.test/admin/kamar/availability?tanggal_masuk=2026-07-01&tanggal_keluar=2026-07-03" -WebSession $s -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 60; Write-Output "Availability status: $($r3.StatusCode), Length: $($r3.Content.Length)"; if ($r3.Content -match 'Tersedia') { Write-Output "Contains 'Tersedia': YES" } else { Write-Output "Contains 'Tersedia': NO" }
summary: $r3 = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://balaidiklat.test/admin/kamar/availability?tanggal_masuk=2026-07-01&tanggal_keluar=2026-07-03" -WebSession $s -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 60; Write-Output "Availability status: $($r3.StatusCode), Length: $($r3.Content.Length)"; if ($r3.Content -match 'Tersedia') { Write-Output "Contains 'Tersedia': YES" } else { Write-Output "Contains 'Tersedia': NO" } -> unknown

command: $r3 = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://balaidiklat.test/admin/kamar/availability?tanggal_masuk=2026-07-01&tanggal_keluar=2026-07-03" -WebSession $s -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 60; if ($r3.Content -match 'Kamar 1') { Write-Output "Has kamar data: YES" }; if ($r3.Content -match 'Cek Available') { Write-Output "Title OK" }; $idx = $r3.Content.IndexOf('Kamar'); if ($idx -ge 0) { Write-Output "Context: $($r3.Content.Substring($idx, 100))" }

command: $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://balaidiklat.test/admin/login" -UseBasicParsing -SessionVariable s -TimeoutSec 15; $token = ([regex]::Match($r.Content, 'name="_token" value="([^"]+)"')).Groups[1].Value; $body = @{email='admin'; password='semarang1'; _token=$token}; Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://balaidiklat.test/admin/login" -Method POST -Body $body -WebSession $s -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 30 | Out-Null; $r3 = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://balaidiklat.test/admin/kamar/availability?tanggal_masuk=2026-07-01&tanggal_keluar=2026-07-03" -WebSession $s -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 60; Write-Output "Status: $($r3.StatusCode)"; if ($r3.Content -match 'Kamar 1') { Write-Output "Has kamar: YES" } else { Write-Output "Has kamar: NO" }; if ($r3.Content -match 'Tersedia') { Write-Output "Has Tersedia: YES" } else { Write-Output "Has Tersedia: NO" }; if ($r3.Content -match 'Stok Total') { Write-Output "Has Stok Total: YES" }
